feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom field from timesheet to pricing for customer project
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using customer projects.

We want to create a custom field in the timesheet and be able to modify the pricing depending on this field. Ex: custom field called 'Travel Time' - box that can be checked. 

If the box is checked, we want to reduce the sales rate by 50% in the app Manage sales rate.

We are able to create custom fields in the timesheet and the pricing, but not to replicate the custom field from the timesheet to the billing/princing.

Basically, we want to reproduce the overtime category process because it's not available for contingent workers. 

Is it possible? Thank you

@WesleyZhang 

@A__Hammerschmid 

@Feras_Al-Basha

entry.title: footer SAP S/4HANA public Cloud.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to change the address of a company in the footer of the forms in SAP S/4HANA public Cloud. I changed them successfully in the "Manage Texts" app in Quality envrionment, and I couldn't do that in Production because of error message : Changes not possible in productive system.

I found that I must import the extensions from Quality system according to Setting Up Output Management (1LQ)

My question is, when I import the extensions, does it automatically update the footers in the Manage Texts app in Production ? or there are more steps to assign them in the forms in prod ? 

Thank you

entry.title: no authorization posting Functional area YB50
entry.content:
Hi ,

I want to know why finance user has no authorization to posting a functional area? Need I add a role for him ? Or some other settings?

entry.title: Withholding Tax in Manage Supplier Line Items
entry.content:
Dear all

 

When I have inputed W/Tax Base and WTax Amt in "Create Incoming Invoice" , I inquire about this item for which from Menu > Document > Display , Withholding Tax is displayed on Display Document: Line Item screen.

However, when I inquire about same Item in "Manage Supplier Line Items", Withholding Tax is displayed as 0.

Please tell me how to display Withholding Tax in "Manage Supplier Line Items".

 

Thanks

entry.title: Unused account in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to tag  f/l account as unused in Public cloud, but I encouter this message:* No message found in T100;

Any idea?

entry.title: Depreciation not calculating for fixed assets
entry.content:
Hi,

Depreciation is not calculating for fixed assets for period 12 in previous fiscal year.

The capitilized date, depreciation start date is 01.03.2024. Acquisition date = 01.04.2024, Asset value date = 01.04.2024

These are assets that were uploaded through the migration cockpit as bulk uploads in 05.2024.

Why could this be happening?

entry.title: How to create additional depreciation areas in public cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

The customer needs additional depreciation areas to follow some asset valuated amounts seperately.

The scope item "Asset Accounting – Additional Depreciation Area"-5HG is active in CBC, however system does not allow to create new depreciation areas in configuration or there is no added depreciation area delivered by SAP. Only two standard depreciation areas are available as 1 for 0L, and 32 for 2L. 

Is there anyway to create new depreciation areas on public cloud environment?

Thanks to all.

entry.title: How to make custom fields flow from Sales order to PR and PO?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts!!

I have created custom fields in Sales order item level in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition. How to make those custom fields flow to Purchase Requisition item and Purchase order item level.

I checked in Business Scenerios option in Custom fields tab while creating custom fields, but there PR and PR is not there.

It would be grateful if you could help me out.

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: SIPT_LIKP - CDS View??
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm using S4HANA Public Cloud System and I need to select from SIPT_LIKP, but that is not possible.
Can you help me to find how can I get a value from that table, or if exist any CDS View??

Thanks,
Ines Martins

entry.title: Change reconciliation account in MIRO 2402
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I found more posts about question, if it is possible to manually change reconciliation account of BP when posting AP invoice via MIRO, but all replies are quite old. 

Do you know by any chance, if it is possible now in public cloud 2402? I didnt find any customizing for it (except for customizing for FI invoices, which doesnt apply to MIRO and field keeps as not editable). 

Maybe activation of additional scope item is needed?

Thank you

Martina

entry.title: Print format in Cloud Public
entry.content:
Dear experts

We want to configure a particular type of printer (Brother PT-P900W) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public.

The only thing we are missing is to know what will be the print format knowing that the maximum print resolution is up to 360dpi and uses ESC/P language.

Thanks for the support.

entry.title: Fetching text from API_PRODUCT_SRV - Filter/key not working in Abap cloud call
entry.content:
Hi all,

I hope you can help. We are currently calling an API from our s4hana public cloud stack (s4pc), uhm, within the same system. Reason is simple: not all cds views provide the correct functionality and with longtext.....well, you have to go to the api side.

We are able to determine the api path and actually call the api to fetch data, but somehow the filtering does not work correctly, in fact, the provisioning of a key doesn't work. 

To give you an idea of the code which actually works when we use the api.sap.com and tryout option:

/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_ProductBasicText?$filter=Product eq '3'

this results in:

sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_ProductBasicText?$filter=Product%20eq%20%273%27

and that results in:

Now, when we actually call this in abap cloud, the filter is not taken into account. The result is this no matter which filter we pass in the query (random examples of things I tried):

lo_request->set_query( query = '?$filter=(Product eq ''3'')&$format=json' ) (3 has like 4 single quotes)

?$filter=Product eq '3'

DATA(query) = |(Product='3',Language='EN')&$format=json|.

So, we tried the different things we could find on tryout, documentation etc, but no application of the filter. 

It always returns the full set of available text without the filter being applied. I tried everything to copy the filter but no results.

The service url it determines based on the comm system/arrangement etc, is this. It does work otherwise we would not get any result.

But the problem is that no matter what, the filter is not taken into account. 

In all honesty, I would rather pass the full key so it would look like this, but can't get it to work with the set_query. Any help in that area would be great! 

 

sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_ProductBasicText(Product='3',Language='EN')

We tried to contact (Product='3', Languate='EN') and pass this to the set_query, but that doesn't work. Replacing it using 'eq', doen't work.

Hope you have some ideas!

All the best

Laurens

entry.title: Check change history for the customer master
entry.content: How to check change history for customer master in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ?

entry.title: Move the old home page to spaces and pages home page in S/4 public cloud
entry.content:
As per SAP document, I should have "import apps now" icon when spaces and pages are switched on in my system. But, there is none. Is there up-to-date blog available on the spaces and pages? since I can see many changes in my test system with enabled spaces and pages, not matching with the blogs released earlier.

Reference: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/getting-familiar-with-spaces-and-pages-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/ba-p/13575120

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Download path of Payment Media in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

 

Does anyone have idea how to download payment media in secured file server from S/4HANA Public Cloud?

 

Via "Manage Payment  Media" app (F1868), payment media can be downloaded manually, and download file path is determined by web browser settings, not by S/4HANA. A customer is pointing our the risks of data falsification as end-users could edit the downloaded payment media before uploading it to bank communication systems.

On-Premise and PCE can configure the download file path, but I didn't find such function in Public Cloud.

 

If you have any idea or experience to tackle this risk, please share it.

 

Best regards,

Tomoyoshi

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Payment Engine

entry.title: Migration Public Cloud for Low Value assets
entry.content:
How could i correctly migrate Low-Value-Assets. I prepared the Data and uploaded the XML.

Have you any informations about the right way to prepare the migration for low value assets?

 

BR Florian

entry.title: Delivery setup indicator for previous year PURCHASE ORDERS
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

I would like to know whether it is possible to SET DELIVERY COMPLITED INDICATOR In Purchase Orders which are previously years pending even though the over deliv tolerence is maintained ...?

 

How to proceed to trigger this indicator for pending PO.....?

entry.title: Remove the ability to delete a purchasing order in Fiori App Manage Material Coverage
entry.content:
in S/4 public cloud - In the tile “Monitor Material Coverage – individual/net segment” if I click on “Stock availability” then “Check Material Coverage” I switch to another tile called “Manage Material Coverage”.

Here, it’s possible to delete a purchasing order. We would like to remove this possibility.

in S/4 PUBLIC Cloud the catalog which allow to access to the tule “Monitor material coverage – Net/Individual” and “Manage Material Coverage” is :

  • SAP_SCM_BC_MRPCOCKPIT_MC

Do you think it's possible to remove the ability to delete a purchasing order with restriction while retaining access to the tile and all other features?

SAP Fiori Cloud

entry.title: Output Parameter Determination for Production Order Output
entry.content:
Hi,

Upon accessing the manufacturing (production) order output thru Output Parameter Determination (OPD), it has Manufacturting_OP_Activity as one of the output type. However, when I tried to add getting an error message 'Selected output type MANUFACTURING_OP_ACTIVITY is not valid for this application'. 

Other than manufacturing order application, I could not find where Manufacturting_OP_Activity can be used.

Please provide how it can be utilized as an output for S/4 Public Cloud as customer has a requirement to print WIP label for a production order.

Thanks,

Falgun Shah

entry.title: Assign Nota Fiscal Type to Sales Document Types - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi friends,

We are implementing Brazil (NF-e / NFS-e) on S/4HANA Public Cloud and are facing some difficulties about the following configurations:

  • Assign Nota Fiscal Type to Sales Document Types (S_ALR_87007608)
  • NF relevant Item Categories (S_ALR_87007627)
  • NF Relevance (Billing Types) (S_ALR_87007624)

We know that these t-codes above do not work in Public Cloud solution and included them just for reference. ‌‌😉

We can't create new sales documents as well.

We searched the SSCUIs documentation but did not find any related IDs to these items.

How to define the types of NFe related to the respective sales documents, Billing, Item categories in Public Cloud and link them? ‌‌🤔

Should we implement only through Badis? ‌‌🤔

Thanks. 🙂

Fabio Spulveda
